title: clausena nana
intro: Clausena nana, also known as the Orange Jessamine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clausena nana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory infections. Clausena nana is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and fruits can also be used to make tinctures and extracts for medicinal purposes.
